beforeSnapshot.name: withValidatedCoords

context.userMessage: Approved. Go ahead with the plan.

rationale: Add clarifying comment that the try/catch is a safety net for unexpected runtime errors, not for expected function failures which now use the Result pattern.
implementation: Only the comments change — the logic remains identical. The try/catch still catches truly unexpected errors (null access, type errors) that bypass the Result pattern.
